Project title: Nuno.
Story mode: long_documentary; target platform: local_only.
Section 1 of 9: Story Part 1.
Section purpose: Locked source script segment.
Beat 1 of 8 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: At midnight, during a power outage in my grandmother’s house, my cousin Carlo sat straight up in bed and whispered:
Next beat narration: “Mom… there’s someone underneath.”

Visual target:
Interior of an old tropical grandmother’s wooden bedroom at midnight during a power outage, deep indigo darkness with only faint moonless shadows, Carlo jolting upright in bed, small and startled, tangled sheet, bed in foreground, woven wall details and wooden floorboards visible, storybook ink-and-gouache illustration, soft brush texture, candle unlit in the room, quiet humid atmosphere, whimsical but eerie composition, no realism, no text

Shot type: medium shot
Camera distance: medium
Lighting: low-key moonless darkness
Lens: 35mm storybook lens feel
Composition: Carlo centered in bed with dark negative space around him
Subject continuity: Keep Carlo small, sleepy, and immediately alarmed in the same wooden bed inside grandmother’s house.
Avoid (beat-specific): electric lights, modern bedroom, spooky monster reveal, photoreal skin, text overlays

Style preset: hand-painted_storybook_folklore
Look and feel: Whimsical tropical island folktale with cozy lived-in interiors and a quiet eerie undertone; painted ink outlines, gouache textures, soft atmospheric shading.
Character anchors: stylized child/teen cousin Carlo with sleepy startled expression; Carlo’s mother as a protective adult woman with practical calm; grandmother’s house interior with woven details, wooden bed frame, candlelight, and dusty floorboards
Character bible: Carlo, role=cousin, age=child or young teen, body=small, slim build, face=round, startled eyes, expressive brows, hair=short dark hair, slightly messy from sleep, wardrobe=simple sleep clothes in muted tropical colors, avoid=adult proportions, modern pajamas, horror makeup | Carlo’s mother, role=parent, age=adult, body=average build, grounded posture, face=focused, concerned expression, hair=dark hair tied back or loosely pinned, wardrobe=simple home dress or blouse and skirt in subdued colors, avoid=dramatic gothic styling, exaggerated fear
Location bible: Grandmother’s house interior, desc=Old wooden tropical house bedroom at midnight, dark except for a candle, with bed, floorboards, woven textures, and a faint humid stillness., continuity=Keep the bedroom layout consistent: bed in foreground or midground, floorboards visible beneath, candle as the only light source after the outage., avoid=modern appliances, electric lights, cluttered horror props, stone basement imagery
Object bible: Candle, desc=Small lit candle held by the mother, warm flickering flame, wax drip visible., continuity=Primary practical light source in the room after the outage., avoid=electric lantern, flashlight, neon glow | Bed, desc=Simple wooden bed with hanging sheets or thin mattress, enough clearance beneath to look under., continuity=The reveal happens beneath this bed., avoid=metal frame, ornate western canopy bed | Bare footprint, desc=Tiny bare footprint pressed into damp dust-soil mix on the floor under the bed, clearly too small for Carlo., continuity=Must be the final reveal object; keep it small, muddy, and unsettling but not gory., avoid=large monster tracks, bloody prints, claw marks
Continuity rules: Maintain a nighttime power-outage atmosphere throughout.; Keep the visual tone playful-magical in illustration treatment, with the eerie element emerging through composition and detail rather than realism.; Use the candle as the only visible light once the mother kneels to inspect under the bed.; The footprint must remain tiny, bare, and visually distinct from Carlo’s size.; Avoid changing the house style, bed placement, or character design between beats.
Avoid: photorealism, 3D render, glossy digital polish, harsh horror, gore, blood, creature close-up, modern anime smoothness, clean vector art, fake text, over-detailed AI clutter, electric lighting, flashlight, basement, hospital, western gothic, distorted anatomy

Visual direction:
Project feel: whimsical but still eerie
Project pacing: measured slow-burn with sharp turns
Project visual style: Whimsical tropical folklore storybook illustration with a nostalgic adventure mood. Hand-painted ink-and-gouache style, confident sketchy linework, soft brush texture, expressive stylized characters, and richly illustrated scenic environments. Lush tropical hills, coconut and banana trees, rivers, old village houses, stone paths, bright clouds, warm sunlight, soft rain, colorful rooftops, and cozy lived-in details. The world should feel playful, magical, scenic, and timeless, like a beloved illustrated folktale set in a tropical island world. Avoid photorealism, 3D render, glossy digital polish, harsh horror, clean vector art, modern anime smoothness, fake text, and over-detailed AI clutter.
